query: SELECT presetName, minDelta, maxDelta, minDte, maxDte, minScore, maxScore, minRsi, maxRsi, minIvRank, maxIvRank, minBbPercent, maxBbPercent FROM filterPresets WHERE userId = 1 AND strategy = 'csp' ORDER BY presetName;
